prompt: Edit image 1: Give the fawn the coat pattern of image 2, placed in image 3's forest setting.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Apply the distinctive spotted coat pattern from the Bengal cat in image 2 to the fawn's fur. Integrate this modified fawn, maintaining its original pose and central orientation looking towards the viewer, into the photorealistic forest setting of image 3. Place the fawn centrally on the dirt path in front of the torii gate from image 3.
